questions.q: What discount does Anthropic apply to cache reads versus the base input rate?
Why must dynamic timestamps go below the cache breakpoint, not above it?
choices: Caches only hit when the prefix is byte-identical; a changing timestamp breaks the match for everything after it
They cost more tokens than static text
Anthropic explicitly rejects timestamps in cached blocks

questions.q: OpenAI's prompt caching is configured how?
choices: A CachedContent API you create and reference
Automatic prefix matching with no configuration
A system-level flag you toggle per project

questions.q: For Anthropic, what write premium does the 1-hour extended TTL cost vs the 5-minute default?
How many reuses are needed to break even on Anthropic's 25% write premium?
